characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair styled in a messy bun and wears dark eyeliner.
characters.wardrobe: Loose brown t-shirt with a faded graphic on the front.
characters.demeanor: Casual, initially slightly frustrated but becomes engaged and happy.

characters.appearance: Voice only, represented by a tablet on the counter.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यार, मुझे English से बहुत डर लगता है। [Man, I am very scared of English.]
Character B says: What is your name? [What is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Neha. [My name is Neha.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
Character B says: "I am 24" मत बोलो। कहो "I am 24 years old." [Don't say "I am 24." Say "I am 24 years old."]
Character A says: Ah, I am 24 years old. [Ah, I am 24 years old.]
Character B says: तुम्हें English से डर क्यों लगता है? [Why are you scared of English?]
Character A says: I am jobless because of my bad English. [I am jobless because of my bad English.]
Character B says: "Jobless" मत बोलो। "Unemployed" कहो। [Don't say "Jobless." Say "Unemployed."]
Character A says: Ah! I am unemployed because of my bad English. [Ah! I am unemployed because of my bad English.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया! तुम्हारी pronunciation एकदम सही थी। [Very good! Your pronunciation was absolutely correct.]
Character A says: क्या तुम रोज़ ऐसे ही मुझे English सिखा सकते हो? [Can you teach me English like this every day?]
Character B says: बिलकुल! बस Supernova app download करो। मैं रोज़ तुम्हारे साथ practice करूँगा और mistakes correct करूँगा। [Absolutely! Just download the Supernova app. I will practice with you every day and correct mistakes.]
Character A says: सही है, मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [That's great, I'll download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the learner's frustration with English in a relatable, everyday setting (multitasking while washing dishes).
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's interactive, conversational correction style in real-time using a natural Hindi-English mix.
- Highlights the core value proposition: daily speaking practice to overcome career hurdles and build confidence.

- Provides a clear call-to-action.
- Displays the Supernova brand and app store availability.
